sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34838" key="e)nantio/boulos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐναντῐό-βουλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n34838.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of contrary purpose</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1617.tlg001:66" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polem.Phgn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">66</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:61:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">61.28</biblScope></bibl>,al.</sense> </entryFree>
